template_tags_in_base: base.html may contain {% %} or {{ title }} tags the engine cannot process — use {{ content }} only
includes_not_rendered: engine has no include system — all global components must be inlined into base.html
assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
base_html_jekyll_tags: base.html may contain Jekyll tags (site.baseurl, site.title, prepend filters, block/endblock) the engine cannot process — audit base.html before first build and replace all with plain values or {{ content }}
missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js may be referenced in base.html but not exist in assets/js/ — check and remove missing JS references from base.html
head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND prepend to body content. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags.
404_slugs_csv: Table.csv in data/ contains 1000 GSC 404 URLs. 100 redirected to singular service-location equivalents. 900 marked 410 Gone. Nginx rules in vhost_nginx.conf.
session_scripts_missing: RESOLVED 2026-07-21 — session_start.sh and session_end.sh were referenced in workflow instructions but never existed on disk. All workflow references now point only to snapshot.sh and restore.sh (both confirmed real and working). Do not reintroduce session_start.sh/session_end.sh references unless those scripts are actually created.
